title: Self-reflection & 1-on-1 cards
description: Seven layers inspired by 1-on-1 best practices (Culture Amp, Quantum Workplace, Navigate, etc.), adapted for the workplace.

checkin: On a scale of 1–10, what's your energy level right now? How would you describe your state in one word?
What's been on your mind this week?
How have work and life been feeling lately?
What's giving you energy right now—and what's draining it?
What's the one thing you most want to discuss in today's 1-on-1?
Any ongoing issues or concerns since we last met?
Has anything recently lifted your mood?
workStatus: What did you spend the most time on this week?
What's your top priority right now?
Does your current workload feel sustainable?
What blockers or bottlenecks are slowing you down?
What went well at work recently?
How far along do you feel toward your current goals?
What resources or information would help you succeed?
Was there work that took longer than expected recently?
selfReflection: When do you feel your strengths show up most in your current role?
Which part of your work feels most meaningful to you?
What have you learned at work recently?
Have you changed how you work recently—and did it help?
What do you wish you'd handled better recently?
What did you learn from a recent setback?
When did you hesitate on a decision recently? What held you back?
What do you think you're protecting unconsciously right now?
What skills do you want to build, or what do you want to try next?
When you picture yourself two years from now, what comes to mind?
growthRelationship: Is there feedback you'd like to give your manager or report?
What would you like them to do more of—or stop doing?
How does collaboration feel on the team right now?
When did you last feel your contribution was recognized?
How do you feel about the direction of the company or team?
What feedback would help you grow most right now?
Is there anything that's hard to say on the team?
Has anyone helped you out recently?
careerFuture: Does your current work connect to what you want to do long term?
What role or position would you like to take on next?
What skill do you want to build in the next year?
What would you like more experience with in your current job?
What kind of work makes you feel you're growing?
What kind of person do you want to become?
Any doubts or uncertainty about your career path?
If nothing held you back, what work would you try?
motivationWorkstyle: What's the most enjoyable part of your job right now?
What's the most stressful part of your job right now?
Are you able to use your strengths in your current work?
How would you describe your motivation at work lately?
When do you feel glad you're doing this job?
What would you like to improve about how you work?
How's your work–life balance been recently?
What would you like to see improve in your environment?
closing: What will you commit to before our next 1-on-1?
Anything we didn't cover today that you want to bring to next time?
Rate today's 1-on-1 from 0 to 10. Why that score?
What word or insight stuck with you most today?
